attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         ,         
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        ,

TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT      ,      
TSS.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,     
TSS.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR	  , 
TSS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR	  ,

TSS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,    
TSS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,

TSS.RU_SERVICE_BRAND_CODE    	  ,

TSS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,  
TSS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,

TSS.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
TSS.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD       ,
TSS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
TSS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
TSS.DSV_FLG                       ,
TSS.DV_CONTRACT_TERM_INT          ,
TSS.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
TSS.DV_MATCH_FLG                  ,
TSS.DV_MULTI_YEAR_FLG             ,
TSS.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         ,
TSS.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE           ,
TSS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
TSS.DV_TRX_TYPE_CD                ,
TSS.DV_TSS_DISCOUNT_MATCH_CD      ,
TSS.ELA_FLG                       ,
TSS.FMV_FLG                       ,
TSS.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME              ,
TSS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_NAME          ,
TSS.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION  ,
TSS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           ,
TSS.REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG       ,
TSS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID       ,
TSS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
TSS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
TSS.SALES_COVERAGE_CD             ,
TSS.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
TSS.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD          ,
TSS.SERVICE_CATEGORY_DESCR        ,
TSS.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
TSS.SO_LINE_CLOSED_DT             ,
TSS.THEATER_NAME                  ,
TSS.TSS_EXCL_FLG                  ,
TSS.VMS_SUBGROUP_NAME             ,
TSS.VMS_TOP_NAME                  ,
TSS.XCAT_FLG                      ,
TSS.DV_BOOKINGS_ADJUSTMENTS_TYPE  ,
SUM(TSS.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT           ,
SUM(TSS.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT     ,
SUM(TSS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
SUM(TSS.DD_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT      ,
SUM(TSS.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_COST_AMT) AS DV_ADJ_COMP_US_COST_AMT       ,
SUM(TSS.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT) AS DV_ADJ_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
SUM(TSS.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
SUM(TSS.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT) AS DV_ADJ_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT  ,
SUM(TSS.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT           ,
PBT.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME         AS BILLTO_CUSTOMER_NAME   ,       
PST.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS  SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_NAME        ,  
SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,    
SOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD              ,
SOL.SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE          , 
SO.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD      ,   
SO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME             ,
SO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,      
SO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME            ,
PT.PARTNER_ID_INT                ,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_NAME,          
PT.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT              ,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_CNTRY_NAME,    
PT.CERTIFICATION_CD              ,
PT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD             ,  
PT.PARTNER_TIER_CD               ,
COALESCE(AD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR,'UNKNOWN'),
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS IN_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS IN_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE_E.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS EX_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,
BE_E.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS EX_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
CPH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT    ,
CPH.GU_PRIMARY_NAME,
ENDCUST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME AS END_CUST_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE_NAME,
PBT.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME AS PO_CUSTOMER_NAME,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_CNTRY_NAME AS BE_GEO_NAME,
SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUMBER,
ENDCUST.GU_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
SUM(TSS.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT) AS DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
TSS.BASE_PRODUCT_ID AS BASE_PRODUCT_ID         


FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_TSS_DISCOUNT_AGGR TSS
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIERARCHY CPH
ON TSS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = CPH.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
ON     TSS.PRODUCT_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY
AND TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'I'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE_E
ON     TSS.PRODUCT_KEY = BE_E.ITEM_KEY
AND TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = BE_E.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND BE_E.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'E'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION AD
ON TSS.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY = AD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY PT
ON TSS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = PT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
ON TSS.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND     SO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SOL
ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND TSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND     SOl.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO PBT
ON TSS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = PBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_SOLDTO PST
ON TSS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = PST.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST
ON TSS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
GROUP BY 
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         ,         
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        ,        
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
TSS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT      ,      
TSS.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,     
TSS.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,      
TSS.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR	  , 
TSS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR	  , 
TSS.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME            ,     
TSS.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY     	  ,    
TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,     
TSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,    
TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,     
TSS.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,   
TSS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                ,   
TSS.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID        ,    
TSS.RU_SERVICE_BRAND_CODE    	  ,     
TSS.RU_SERVICE_LEVEL_GROUP_CODE   ,
TSS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,  
TSS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,

TSS.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
TSS.ADJUSTMENT_CD                 ,

TSS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            ,
TSS.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME     ,
TSS.BK_PRODUCT_ID                 ,
TSS.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID        ,
TSS.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID        ,
TSS.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,

TSS.DV_MATCH_FLG                  ,
TSS.DV_MULTI_YEAR_FLG             ,
TSS.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD         ,
TSS.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE           ,
TSS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
TSS.DV_TRX_TYPE_CD                ,
TSS.DV_TSS_DISCOUNT_MATCH_CD      ,
TSS.ELA_FLG                       ,

TSS.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID       ,
TSS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
TSS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
TSS.SALES_COVERAGE_CD             ,
TSS.SALES_REP_NUM                 ,
TSS.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CD          ,
TSS.SERVICE_CATEGORY_DESCR        ,
TSS.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
TSS.SO_LINE_CLOSED_DT             ,
TSS.THEATER_NAME                  ,
TSS.TSS_EXCL_FLG                  ,
TSS.VMS_SUBGROUP_NAME             ,
TSS.VMS_TOP_NAME                  ,
TSS.XCAT_FLG                      ,
TSS.DV_BOOKINGS_ADJUSTMENTS_TYPE  ,
PBT.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,

SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,    
SOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
SOL.SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE          , 
SO.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD      ,   
SO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME             ,
SO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,      
SO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME            ,
PT.PARTNER_ID_INT                ,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_NAME,          
PT.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT              ,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_CNTRY_NAME,    
PT.CERTIFICATION_CD              ,
PT.PARTNER_TYPE_CD             ,  
PT.PARTNER_TIER_CD               ,
AD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR,
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE_E.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE_E.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
CPH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT    ,
CPH.GU_PRIMARY_NAME,
ENDCUST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME,
PBT.ERP_WIPS_CUSTOMER_NAME,
PT.CHANNEL_PARTNER_CNTRY_NAME,
SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,

TSS.BASE_PRODUCT_ID
